experience.title: Technical Engineer Apprentice
bullets: Developed a UART Transactor for the Zebu emulator using C++ to support verification and emulation flows.
Enhanced protocol functionality for Zebu Transactors using C++ to improve compatibility and performance.
Created a HW/SW Testbench Backwards Compatibility Agent and script for Zebu Transactors, incorporating AI‑assisted code review.

experience.title: ASIC Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Performed timing closure and performance optimization for advanced SoC designs using Static Timing Analysis (STA).
Created Perl scripts to automate STA report analysis and streamline sign‑off workflows.
Performed manual fixes to resolve clock transition and crosstalk violations in critical paths.

experience.company: Jabil Circuit India Private Limited Pune
experience.title: Test Engineer Intern (here)
bullets: Performed functional verification, debugging, and testing of Ericsson’s 5G Radio Transceiver (AIR3268).
Executed the SMT assembly process for Ericsson AIR 3268 transceiver PCBA.
Configured, measured, and calibrated Keysight test equipment for accurate validation.

projects.name: Development and Implementation of a 5G Modem using an FPGA Board
bullets: Implemented FM broadcast and radio functionality using an Adalm‑Pluto SDR platform.
Conducted hardware‑in‑the‑loop simulation of FFT on a Kintex‑7 KC705 FPGA development board.
Developed Simulink models and implemented a 5G transceiver on FPGA using Vitis Model Composer.

projects.name: Robosoccer Bot
bullets: Built an RC‑controlled robot with a laser‑cut metal chassis, Sabertooth motor driver, and geared motors.

projects.name: Test Data Compression for System-on-a-Chip Using Huffman Codes April 2024
bullets: Implemented Huffman coding for data compression on an FPGA using Xilinx Vivado.

projects.name: Smart Irrigation System
bullets: Led a team to design a smart irrigation system for flood‑irrigated paddy fields using IoT‑based solutions.
Integrated ESP‑32 microcontroller, nRF24L01 RF module, GSM SIM800A, and BME280 with Thingspeak IoT cloud for monitoring.
Worked on water conservation by automating water flow and alerting the farmer about the weather.

education.institution: THAPAR INSTITUTE OF ENGINEERING AND TECHNOLOGY Patiala
